training.loss_notes: default CrossEntropyLoss over flattened target-gene classes

pipeline_program.perturbation_side: parent pathway-pooling residual MLP context trunk
pipeline_program.target_side: Reactome pathway membership aligned to official target order plus dense target logits
pipeline_program.fusion: preserve parent pathway residual; training-strategy delta only
pipeline_program.head: parent pathway pooling dense/residual logits
pipeline_program.training_strategy: weighted cross entropy from base_config; validation Macro-F1 reward unchanged
pipeline_program.paper_alignment: class-weighted CE training on parent-preserved pathway pooling child
